task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the site-wide cohort named 'Engineering Program Cohort 2024' with ID 'eng2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 specified students are added to the cohort.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cohort members page showing eng_alice, eng_bob, eng_carol, eng_dave, and eng_emma in the 'Current users' list, or the main cohorts list showing a cohort size of exactly 5 for this cohort.

task_completion.description: Verify that cohort synchronization is configured for CS110 (Computer Science Fundamentals).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Enrollment methods page for CS110 showing 'Cohort sync' active for 'Engineering Program Cohort 2024' with the 'Student' role.

task_completion.description: Verify that cohort synchronization is configured for ENG110 (Introduction to Engineering).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Enrollment methods page for ENG110 showing 'Cohort sync' active for 'Engineering Program Cohort 2024' with the 'Student' role.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 cohort members are successfully enrolled in the target courses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Participants list for CS110 and/or ENG110 showing the 5 students enrolled, or the Enrollment methods page for the courses showing exactly 5 users enrolled via the cohort sync method.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the Moodle administration and course settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens like Site Administration, Users, Cohorts, Course settings, and Enrollment methods.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or database client to insert the records directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running MySQL/MariaDB commands or PHP scripts to bypass the UI.
